_meta.description: Company-filings values that were well-extracted (eligible) but NOT wired to Excel because the metric basis/scope cannot be unambiguously matched to the cell. These are NOT parser failures - they keep full source proof and appear on the Blocked Data sheet.
_meta.preferred_ratio_basis_rule: For combined/claims/expense/commission ratios, when both the statutory IRDAI 1/n basis and a company-adjusted ex-1/n basis exist, the Excel cell uses the statutory 1/n value; the adjusted value is recorded here as basis_mismatch_ex_1n_adjusted. If a source's basis is unclear, it is held basis_unclear and not auto-filled.

reasons.basis_unclear: non-statutory / adjusted basis vs the statutory IGAAP cell; basis (1/n vs ex-1/n) not clearly stated
reasons.scope_unclear: company-wide vs health-only / GDPI vs total GWP
reasons.basis_mismatch_ex_1n_adjusted: ex-1/n / management-adjusted ratio superseded by the statutory 1/n value for the Excel cell
reasons.superseded_by_statutory_filing: as-originally-reported premium superseded by the statutory NL-1 filing (restated comparative); statutory value fills the cell
reasons.period_unclear: premium amount whose NL-form column basis does not match the cell's period (quarter vs full-period); withheld so it is not promoted into the wrong cell

data.source_description: Niva Bupa FY2024-25 Annual Report — Schedule 1 'Premium Earned [Net]'. Headline GWP 7,407 Cr is ex-1/n; gross_direct_premium 6,762.23 Cr is the Revenue-Account (IRDAI 1/n) basis that NWP 5,369.43 Cr and NEP 4,894.46 Cr derive from (reinsurance ceded 1,392.80 Cr).
data.note: Annual report adjusted ex-1/n ratio; not comparable to statutory 1/n cell

data.source_description: Niva Bupa FY2024-25 Annual Report — Note 29 'Summary of Financial Statements' (5-year): Net Premium Income FY23 = 3,18,311 Lakhs → NWP 3,183.11 Cr (GWP 4,07,303 Lakhs). NEP 2,841 retained from prior FY2022-23 disclosure (not restated in this report).
data.note: As-originally-reported figure superseded by the statutory NL-1 filing (restated comparative); the statutory value fills the cell
